moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships kick off on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches on Monday. Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: London Local Angle
angles.copy: The biggest tennis tournament in the world is back on our doorstep! Wimbledon kicks off Monday – expect the usual buzz across SW19 and beyond.

moments.title: UEFA U19 Euros hosted by Wales
moments.blurb: Wales hosts the UEFA European Under-19 Championship finals from June 28 to July 11, with matches played across North Wales venues, and Cymru's opening game against Spain on Sunday.

angles.name: Wales Hosts
angles.copy: Cymru take centre stage! The UEFA U19 European Championship kicks off in North Wales this Sunday, with the host nation facing Spain. Get behind the boys!

angles.name: North Wales Buzz
angles.copy: It's almost here! The UEFA U19 Euros are coming to North Wales, starting Sunday. Who's heading to Wrexham, Bangor, Caernarfon or Denbigh to catch the action?

moments.title: UK Heatwave continues, thunderstorms loom
moments.blurb: A significant heatwave continues across central and southern England today with potential highs of 38-39°C, while thunderstorms are forecast for parts of the UK, especially the southeast, as conditions begin to cool slightly in the west.

angles.name: Heat & Thunder
angles.copy: Another scorcher for many today, but keep an eye on the skies! Thunderstorms are expected in some areas as the heatwave gradually breaks. Stay safe and hydrated!

angles.name: Regional Impact
angles.copy: Extreme heat persists in the capital today, but forecasters warn of potential thunderstorms later. How are you coping with the hot and humid conditions?

moments.title: Taylor Swift's 'Toy Story 5' track tops charts
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You,' from the 'Toy Story 5' soundtrack, was the UK's Official Trending Chart Number 1 and achieved the biggest week of single sales in three years for the week ending June 25.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Queen of the charts! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from Toy Story 5 is dominating, scoring the biggest sales week in three years. What a Swiftie triumph!

angles.name: Movie & Music
angles.copy: From the 'Toy Story 5' soundtrack to the top of the charts! Taylor Swift proves she's unstoppable with her latest hit. Have you heard it yet?

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar and 'Wicked' star Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday today, June 26.

angles.name: Pop Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande! From Nickelodeon to global pop sensation, what's your favourite Ari track?

angles.name: Wicked Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd today! The 'Wicked' star continues to enchant us with her incredible voice and presence.

moments.title: Mick Jones of The Clash turns 71
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, legendary guitarist and vocalist of The Clash and Big Audio Dynamite, celebrates his 71st birthday today, June 26.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to the iconic Mick Jones! From The Clash to Big Audio Dynamite, his riffs defined generations. What's your favourite Jonesy moment?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: A true legend turns 71 today! Mick Jones of The Clash, whose influence is still felt across music. Give a shout out to his incredible career!

moments.title: Chris Isaak turns 70
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice behind 'Wicked Game,' Chris Isaak, celebrates his 70th birthday today, June 26.

angles.name: Wicked Game Voice
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the smooth and stylish Chris Isaak! What's your favourite track from the 'Wicked Game' crooner?

angles.name: Rock & Roll
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 70th to the one and only Chris Isaak! His unique blend of rockabilly and rock 'n' roll has captivated us for decades.

moments.title: Ryan Tedder of OneRepublic turns 47
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning songwriter and OneRepublic frontman Ryan Tedder celebrates his 47th birthday today, June 26.

angles.name: Hitmaker Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday to Ryan Tedder! Not only the voice of OneRepublic, but a songwriting genius behind countless hits. What's your favourite song he's written?

angles.name: OneRepublic Love
angles.copy: Celebrating OneRepublic's main man, Ryan Tedder, on his 47th birthday! From 'Apologize' to 'Counting Stars,' his music is timeless.

moments.title: Radiohead's Colin Greenwood turns 57
moments.blurb: Colin Greenwood, the acclaimed bassist of the iconic band Radiohead, celebrates his 57th birthday today, June 26.

angles.name: Radiohead Bassist
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to Radiohead's brilliant bassist, Colin Greenwood! What's your favourite Radiohead album?

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Colin Greenwood! A cornerstone of Radiohead's sound, turning 57 today. Celebrate with some classic alt-rock!

moments.title: Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys turns 84
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-standing member of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow, June 27.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Catch a wave for Bruce Johnston, who turns 84 tomorrow! A key part of The Beach Boys' iconic sound. What's your favourite Beach Boys classic?

angles.name: Surfin' Safari
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate Bruce Johnston's 84th! His harmonies with The Beach Boys are legendary. Get ready for some good vibrations!

moments.title: Leigh Nash of Sixpence None the Richer turns 50
moments.blurb: Leigh Nash, the distinctive voice of Sixpence None the Richer, celebrates her 50th birthday tomorrow, June 27.

angles.name: Kiss Me at 50
angles.copy: Kiss Me! Leigh Nash of Sixpence None the Richer turns 50 tomorrow. Still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite 90s indie-pop gem?

angles.name: A Beautiful Voice
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Leigh Nash celebrates her 50th! Her voice on 'Kiss Me' is simply unforgettable. Perfect for a relaxed listen.

moments.title: H.E.R. turns 29
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer and songwriter H.E.R. celebrates her 29th birthday tomorrow, June 27.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible H.E.R. turns 29! Her soulful voice and powerful lyrics have earned her multiple Grammys. What's your top H.E.R. track?

angles.name: Future Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the talent of H.E.R. on her 29th birthday tomorrow! Her music speaks volumes. Tune in for some of her best.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Pussycat Dolls lead singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a happy birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday! From pop star to West End sensation, she truly does it all.

angles.name: TV & Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's 48th on Monday! Revisit some Pussycat Dolls hits and her solo bangers to mark the occasion.

moments.title: Colin Hay of Men at Work turns 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive frontman of the Australian band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Down Under Legend
angles.copy: Can you hear that? It's the sound of Colin Hay turning 73 on Monday! The voice of Men at Work, what's your favourite track from the Aussie legends?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Happy 73rd to Colin Hay this Monday! His unique songwriting with Men at Work has stood the test of time. A true classic!

moments.title: Deep Purple's Ian Paice turns 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only continuous member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Drumming Dynamo
angles.copy: Marking 78 years of drumming mastery! Happy Birthday to Deep Purple's Ian Paice this Monday. What's your favourite Deep Purple anthem?

angles.name: Hard Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate Ian Paice's 78th! A true pioneer of hard rock drumming. Get ready for some 'Smoke on the Water'!

moments.title: Don Dokken of Dokken turns 73
moments.blurb: Don Dokken, the frontman and namesake of the American heavy metal band Dokken, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Metal Voice
angles.copy: Happy 73rd to Don Dokken this Monday! The voice of Dokken, bringing us classic 80s metal. What's your favourite Dokken power ballad?

angles.name: 80s Hair Metal
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Dokken's 73rd on Monday! Relive the glory days of 80s hair metal with some Dokken classics.

moments.title: Abz Love of 5ive turns 47
moments.blurb: Abz Love, known as a member of the popular 90s boy band 5ive, celebrates his 47th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Boy Band Blast
angles.copy: Everybody get up for Abz Love's 47th birthday on Monday! The 5ive star always brought the energy. What's your favourite 5ive track?

angles.name: Pop Nostalgia
angles.copy: Celebrating Abz Love's 47th on Monday! Relive some classic 5ive tunes and remember those iconic dance moves.

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Influential electronic music pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on Thursday, July 3.

angles.name: Synth Pop Genius
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth-pop legend Vince Clarke this Thursday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his electronic magic is unmatched. What's your favourite of his bands?

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring influence of Vince Clarke on his 66th this Thursday! A true titan of electronic music.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum artist Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles,' celebrates his 31st birthday on Friday, July 4.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone this Friday! From rap to country, he truly defies genre. What's your favourite Posty track?

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st this Friday! His unique sound has earned him global fame. Tune in for some of his biggest hits.

moments.title: New Films Hit UK Cinemas Today
moments.blurb: Several new films are released in UK cinemas today, June 26, including the DC Universe's 'Supergirl', the drama 'Blue Heron', and the UK-shot '500 Miles'.

angles.name: Friday Film Fun
angles.copy: Ready for the cinema this weekend? New films out today include DC's 'Supergirl', the emotional 'Blue Heron', and the UK-made '500 Miles'!

angles.name: Superhero & Drama
angles.copy: From superheroes to heartfelt dramas, there's plenty to watch in cinemas from today! What are you planning to see this weekend?
